entity.summary: Kaia concentrated-liquidity decentralized exchange integrated with Swapscanner, combining KAIA staking and liquidity provision while generating current swap fees, protocol revenue, and DEX volume.
entity.notes: Current first-party Swapscanner website exposes a CL DEX navigation surface alongside trade, staking, portfolio, docs, and swap features. DefiLlama independently reports current Kaia TVL, fees, revenue, and recent DEX volume for Consensus Liquidity DEX.

evidence.title: Swapscanner CL DEX official platform
evidence.notes: Current first-party platform exposes CL DEX, Trade, Swap Pro, DCA, Staking, Portfolio, docs, and token ecosystem surfaces on Kaia.

evidence.title: Consensus Liquidity DEX metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry identifies Consensus Liquidity DEX as a Kaia CLMM and reports current TVL, fees, revenue, and non-zero 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour DEX volume.

evidence.title: Consensus Liquidity DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies Consensus Liquidity DEX as a Kaia decentralized exchange.
